projects.title: Parent Copilot - KG-RAG System
projects.description: Architected and launched a Knowledge Graph RAG using Neo4j and Vertex AI to power a 'Parent Copilot', driving a 30% DAU/MAU ratio through high-relevance AI interactions.
achievements: 50%+ cost reduction by replacing legacy outsourced infrastructure
Deterministic Multi-Agent system with strict guardrails
Real-time user-facing chat with hallucination prevention

projects.title: Enterprise RAG Platform
projects.description: Deployed a self-hosted RAG system serving 50+ child companies, replacing Google's Vertex AI Agent Builder to eliminate unit limits and reduce operational costs by 40%.
achievements: Ultra-low latency semantic search with Redis caching

projects.title: Auto Review Pipeline
projects.description: Engineered the 'Auto Review' pipeline for Pixta Stock, processing 10,000+ daily images with 99% precision and 70% recall by fine-tuning CLIP and BLIP-v2 models.

projects.title: Legal Documents Retrieval
projects.description: Developed a domain-specific retrieval engine using a hybrid Bi-Encoder and Cross-Encoder architecture, achieving MRR@10 of 0.7352.
